Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** * Usual constructive Dedekind cuts *)
(** Catherine LELAY. July 2017 *)
(** This file formalizes the usual definitions of constructive Dedekind cuts.
- The two-sided definition come from the HoTT-book
- The one-sided definition come from Robert S Lubarsky and Michael Rathjen. On the constructive
Dedekind reals. Logic and Analysis.

I first prove the equivalence between these two definitions, then I prove the equivalence between
the non-negative numbers of the one-sided definition and the set Dcuts *)


Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]


Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.RealNumbers.NonnegativeRationals.

Notations "_ / _" defined at level 40 with arguments
constr at level 40 and "_ / 2" defined at level 35
with arguments constr at next level
have incompatible prefixes.
One of them will likely not work.
[notation-incompatible-prefix,parsing,default]


Unset Kernel Term Sharing.

(** ** Usual definitions *)

Local Open Scope hq_scope.

Definition isTwoSided (L U : hq → hProp) : UU :=
  ((∏ q : hq, L q <-> ∃ r : hq, L r ∧ hqlth q r)
     × (∏ q : hq, U q <-> ∃ r : hq, U r ∧ hqlth r q))
    × ((∃ q : hq, L q) × (∃ q : hq, U q))
    × (∏ q : hq, ¬ (U q ∧ L q))
    × (∏ q r : hq, hqlth q r → L q ∨ U r).

Definition isOneSided (S : hq → hProp) : UU :=
  ((∃ r : hq, S r) ∧ (∃ r : hq, ¬ S r))
    × (∏ r : hq, S r → ∃ q : hq, S q ∧ hqlth r q)
    × (∏ r s : hq, hqlth r s → S r ∨ ¬ S s).

(** ** Equivalence between these two definitions *)


∏ L U : hq → hProp, isTwoSided L U → isOneSided L


∏ L U : hq → hProp, isTwoSided L U → isOneSided L

  
L, U: hq → hProp
H: isTwoSided L U
isOneSided L

  
L, U: hq → hProp
H: isTwoSided L U
∃ r : hq, L r
L, U: hq → hProp
H: isTwoSided L U
∃ r : hq, ¬ L r
L, U: hq → hProp
H: isTwoSided L U
∏ r : hq, L r → ∃ q : hq, L q ∧ r < q
L, U: hq → hProp
H: isTwoSided L U
∏ r s : hq, r < s → L r ∨ ¬ L s

  
L, U: hq → hProp
H: isTwoSided L U
∃ r : hq, L r
 exact (pr1 (pr1 (pr2 H))).

∃ r : hq, ¬ L r

→ ∑ S : hq → hProp, isOneSided S: (∑ L U : hq → hProp, isTwoSided L U)
→ ∑ S : hq → hProp, isOneSided S

 pr1 S,,
 (λ s : hq, ∃ r : hq, r < s × ¬ pr1 S r),,
 isOneSided_TwoSided (pr1 S) (pr2 S))

→ ∑ L U : hq → hProp, isTwoSided L U: (∑ S : hq → hProp, isOneSided S)
→ ∑ L U : hq → hProp, isTwoSided L U

isaprop ((∃ q : hq, pr1 LU q) × (∃ q : hq, y q))

 pr1 LU,,
 isTwoSided_OneSided (pr1 LU) (pr12 LU) (pr22 LU))

isaprop
  ((∏ q : hq, ¬ (y q ∧ pr1 LU q))

        intros Uq ; apply Uq.

y: hq → hProp
isaprop
  (∑ _ : (∃ r : hq, y r) ∧ (∃ r : hq, ¬ y r),
   (∏ r : hq, y r → ∃ q : hq, y q ∧ r < q)
   × (∏ r s : hq, r < s → y r ∨ ¬ y s))

pr1 (f (g S)) = pr1 S

y: hq → hProp
isaprop ((∃ r : hq, y r) ∧ (∃ r : hq, ¬ y r))
f:= (λ LU : ∑ L U : hq → hProp, isTwoSided L U,
 pr1 LU,,
 isTwoSided_OneSided (pr1 LU) (pr12 LU) (pr22 LU))
:
(∑ L U : hq → hProp, isTwoSided L U)
→ ∑ S : hq → hProp, isOneSided S: (∑ L U : hq → hProp, isTwoSided L U)
→ ∑ S : hq → hProp, isOneSided S
g:= (λ S : ∑ S : hq → hProp, isOneSided S,
 pr1 S,,
 (λ s : hq, ∃ r : hq, r < s × ¬ pr1 S r),,
 isOneSided_TwoSided (pr1 S) (pr2 S))
:
(∑ S : hq → hProp, isOneSided S)
→ ∑ L U : hq → hProp, isTwoSided L U: (∑ S : hq → hProp, isOneSided S)
→ ∑ L U : hq → hProp, isTwoSided L U
S: ∑ S : hq → hProp, isOneSided S
y: hq → hProp
isaprop
  ((∏ r : hq, y r → ∃ q : hq, y q ∧ r < q)
   × (∏ r s : hq, r < s → y r ∨ ¬ y s))

r, s: hq

           apply isapropimpl, propproperty.
    
f:= (λ LU : ∑ L U : hq → hProp, isTwoSided L U,
 pr1 LU,,
 isTwoSided_OneSided (pr1 LU) (pr12 LU) (pr22 LU))
:
(∑ L U : hq → hProp, isTwoSided L U)
→ ∑ S : hq → hProp, isOneSided S: (∑ L U : hq → hProp, isTwoSided L U)
→ ∑ S : hq → hProp, isOneSided S
g:= (λ S : ∑ S : hq → hProp, isOneSided S,
 pr1 S,,
 (λ s : hq, ∃ r : hq, r < s × ¬ pr1 S r),,
 isOneSided_TwoSided (pr1 S) (pr2 S))
:
(∑ S : hq → hProp, isOneSided S)
→ ∑ L U : hq → hProp, isTwoSided L U: (∑ S : hq → hProp, isOneSided S)
→ ∑ L U : hq → hProp, isTwoSided L U
S: ∑ S : hq → hProp, isOneSided S
pr1 (f (g S)) = pr1 S
 reflexivity.
Qed.

(** ** Equivalence of Dcuts with usual definitions *)


∏ D : hq → hProp,
isOneSided D
→ Dcuts_def_bot
    (λ r : NonnegativeRationals, D (pr1 r))

→ Dcuts_def_bot
    (λ r : NonnegativeRationals, D (pr1 r))

  
D: hq → hProp
H: isOneSided D
r: NonnegativeRationals
Dr: D (pr1 r)
q: NonnegativeRationals
Hq: (q <= r)%NRat
D (pr1 q)

r: NonnegativeRationals
Dr: D (pr1 r)
q: NonnegativeRationals
(q = r) ⨿ (q < r)%NRat → D (pr1 q)

    exact Dr.

D (pr1 q)

r: NonnegativeRationals
Dr: D (pr1 r)
q: NonnegativeRationals
H0: pr1 q < pr1 r
D (pr1 q) ∨ ¬ D (pr1 r) → D (pr1 q)

    
D: hq → hProp
H: isOneSided D
r: NonnegativeRationals

D (pr1 q)
D: hq → hProp

r: NonnegativeRationals
Dr: D (pr1 r)
q: NonnegativeRationals
H0: pr1 q < pr1 r
Dq: ¬ D (pr1 r)
D (pr1 q)

    
D: hq → hProp
H: isOneSided D
r: NonnegativeRationals
Dr: D (pr1 r)
q: NonnegativeRationals
H0: pr1 q < pr1 r
Dq: D (pr1 q)
D (pr1 q)
 exact Dq.
    
D: hq → hProp
H: isOneSided D
r: NonnegativeRationals
Dr: D (pr1 r)
q: NonnegativeRationals
H0: pr1 q < pr1 r
Dq: ¬ D (pr1 r)
D (pr1 q)
 apply fromempty, Dq, Dr.
Qed.

→ Dcuts_def_open

r: NonnegativeRationals
Dr: D (pr1 r)
q: ∑ q : hq, D q ∧ pr1 r < q
0 <= pr1 r
 exact (pr2 r). 
D: hq → hProp
H: isOneSided D
r: NonnegativeRationals
Dr: D (pr1 r)
q: ∑ q : hq, D q ∧ pr1 r < q
pr1 r <= pr1 q

    apply hqlthtoleh, (pr2 (pr2 q)). 
D: hq → hProp
H: isOneSided D
r: NonnegativeRationals
Dr: D (pr1 r)
q: ∑ q : hq, D q ∧ pr1 r < q

∑ y : NonnegativeRationals, D (pr1 y) × (r < y)%NRat

r: NonnegativeRationals
Dr: D (pr1 r)
q: ∑ q : hq, D q ∧ pr1 r < q
Hq: 0 <= pr1 q
D (pr1 (pr1 q,, Hq)) × (r < pr1 q,, Hq)%NRat

H: isOneSided D
r: NonnegativeRationals
Dr: D (pr1 r)
q: ∑ q : hq, D q ∧ pr1 r < q
Hq: 0 <= pr1 q
D (pr1 (pr1 q,, Hq))

r: NonnegativeRationals
Dr: D (pr1 r)
q: ∑ q : hq, D q ∧ pr1 r < q
Hq: 0 <= pr1 q
(r < pr1 q,, Hq)%NRat

r: NonnegativeRationals
Dr: D (pr1 r)

D: hq → hProp

r: NonnegativeRationals
Dr: D (pr1 r)
q: ∑ q : hq, D q ∧ pr1 r < q
Hq: 0 <= pr1 q
D (NonnegativeRationals_to_Rationals (pr1 q,, Hq))

    exact (pr1 (pr2 q)).
  
D: hq → hProp
H: isOneSided D
r: NonnegativeRationals
Dr: D (pr1 r)
q: ∑ q : hq, D q ∧ pr1 r < q
Hq: 0 <= pr1 q
(r < pr1 q,, Hq)%NRat
 
D: hq → hProp

r: NonnegativeRationals
Dr: D (pr1 r)
q: ∑ q : hq, D q ∧ pr1 r < q
Hq: 0 <= pr1 q
pr1 r < pr1 (pr1 q,, Hq)

    
D: hq → hProp
H: isOneSided D
r: NonnegativeRationals
Dr: D (pr1 r)
q: ∑ q : hq, D q ∧ pr1 r < q
Hq: 0 <= pr1 q
pr1 r < NonnegativeRationals_to_Rationals (pr1 q,, Hq)

    exact (pr2 (pr2 q)).
Qed.


∏ (D : hq → hProp) (c : hq),
isOneSided D → isOneSided (λ q : hq, D (q + c))


∏ (D : hq → hProp) (c : hq),
isOneSided D → isOneSided (λ q : hq, D (q + c))

  
D: hq → hProp
c: hq
Hd: isOneSided D
isOneSided (λ q : hq, D (q + c))

  
D: hq → hProp
c: hq
Hd: isOneSided D
∃ r : hq, D (r + c)
D: hq → hProp
c: hq
Hd: isOneSided D
∃ r : hq, ¬ D (r + c)
D: hq → hProp
c: hq
Hd: isOneSided D
∏ r : hq, D (r + c) → ∃ q : hq, D (q + c) ∧ r < q
D: hq → hProp
c: hq
Hd: isOneSided D
∏ r s : hq, r < s → D (r + c) ∨ ¬ D (s + c)

  
D: hq → hProp
c: hq
Hd: isOneSided D
∃ r : hq, D (r + c)
 
D: hq → hProp

Hd: isOneSided D
(∃ r : hq, D r) → ∃ r : hq, D (r + c)

Hd: isOneSided D
(∑ r : hq, D r) → ∑ r : hq, D (r + c)

    
D: hq → hProp

Hd: isOneSided D
r: ∑ r : hq, D r
∑ r : hq, D (r + c)

    
D: hq → hProp
c: hq
Hd: isOneSided D
r: ∑ r : hq, D r
D (pr1 r - c + c)

    
D: hq → hProp
c: hq
Hd: isOneSided D
r: ∑ r : hq, D r
D (pr1 r + - c + c)

    
D: hq → hProp
c: hq
Hd: isOneSided D
r: ∑ r : hq, D r
D (pr1 r)

    exact (pr2 r).
  
D: hq → hProp
c: hq
Hd: isOneSided D
∃ r : hq, ¬ D (r + c)
 
D: hq → hProp

(∑ r : hq, ¬ D r) → ∑ r : hq, ¬ D (r + c)

r: ∑ r : hq, ¬ D r
∑ r : hq, ¬ D (r + c)

r: ∑ r : hq, ¬ D r
¬ D (pr1 r - c + c)

    
D: hq → hProp
c: hq
Hd: isOneSided D
r: ∑ r : hq, ¬ D r
¬ D (pr1 r + - c + c)

    
D: hq → hProp
c: hq
Hd: isOneSided D
r: ∑ r : hq, ¬ D r
¬ D (pr1 r)

    exact (pr2 r).
  
D: hq → hProp
c: hq
Hd: isOneSided D
∏ r : hq, D (r + c) → ∃ q : hq, D (q + c) ∧ r < q

r: hq

∃ q : hq, D (q + c) ∧ r < q

→ ∃ q : hq, D (q + c) ∧ r < q

c: hq

→ Dcuts_def_corr
    (λ r : NonnegativeRationals, D (pr1 r))

H: isOneSided D
c: NonnegativeRationals
Hc: pr1 c > pr1 0%NRat
H0: D (pr1 0%NRat)
r: ∑ r : hq, ¬ D r
n: ∑ n : nat, nattoring n > pr1 r / (pr1 c / 2)
Hc': pr1 c / 2 > 0
hqneq (pr1 c / 2) 0
 apply hqgth_hqneq, Hc'. 
D: hq → hProp
H: isOneSided D
c: NonnegativeRationals
Hc: pr1 0%NRat < pr1 c
H0: D (pr1 0%NRat)
r: ∑ r : hq, ¬ D r
n: ∑ n : nat, nattoring n > pr1 r / (pr1 c / 2)
Hc': pr1 c / 2 > 0
H1: pr1 r < nattoring (pr1 n) * (pr1 c / 2)
∃ q : NonnegativeRationals,
D (pr1 q) × ¬ D (pr1 (q + c)%NRat)

D: hq → hProp

n: nat

D: hq → hProp
H: isOneSided D
c: NonnegativeRationals
Hc: pr1 0%NRat < pr1 c
H0: D (pr1 0%NRat)
Hc': pr1 c / 2 > 0
H2: ∏ m : nat,
nattoring m * (pr1 c / 2) + pr1 c =
nattoring (m + 2) * (pr1 c / 2)
n: nat
m:= 0%nat: nat
D (nattoring m * (pr1 c / hztohq (nattohz (S (S m)))))
→ ¬ D
      (nattoring (m + S n) *
       (pr1 c / hztohq (nattohz (S (S m)))))
  → ∃ q : NonnegativeRationals,
    D (pr1 q) × ¬ D (pr1 (q + c)%NRat)

nattoring m * (pr1 c / 2) + pr1 c =
nattoring (m + 2) * (pr1 c / 2)
n: nat
m:= 0%nat: nat
D (nattoring m * (pr1 c / 2))
→ ¬ D (nattoring (m + S n) * (pr1 c / 2))
  → ∃ q : NonnegativeRationals,
    D (pr1 q) × ¬ D (pr1 (q + c)%NRat)

  
D: hq → hProp
H: isOneSided D
c: NonnegativeRationals
Hc: pr1 0%NRat < pr1 c
Hc': pr1 c / 2 > 0
H2: ∏ m : nat,
nattoring m * (pr1 c / 2) + pr1 c =

→ ¬ D (nattoring (m + S n) * (pr1 c / 2))

nattoring (m + 2) * (pr1 c / 2)
n: nat
IHn: ∏ D : hq → hProp,
isOneSided D
→ ∏ m : nat,
D (nattoring m * (pr1 c / 2))
→ ¬ D (nattoring (m + S n) * (pr1 c / 2))
→ ∃ q : NonnegativeRationals, D (pr1 q) × ¬ D (pr1 (q + c)%NRat)

∏ D : NonnegativeRationals → hProp,
Dcuts_def_bot D
→ Dcuts_def_open D
  → Dcuts_def_corr D
    → isOneSided
        (λ q : hq,
         sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > q, htrue)
           (λ Hq : 0 <= q, D (q,, Hq))
           (hqgthorleh 0 q))


∏ D : NonnegativeRationals → hProp,
Dcuts_def_bot D
→ Dcuts_def_open D
  → Dcuts_def_corr D
    → isOneSided
        (λ q : hq,
         sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > q, htrue)
           (λ Hq : 0 <= q, D (q,, Hq))
           (hqgthorleh 0 q))

  
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
isOneSided
  (λ q : hq,
   sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > q, htrue)
     (λ Hq : 0 <= q, D (q,, Hq)) (hqgthorleh 0 q))

  
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
∃ r : hq,
sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > r, htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
  (hqgthorleh 0 r)
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
∃ r : hq,
¬ sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > r, htrue)
    (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
    (hqgthorleh 0 r)
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
∏ r : hq,
sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > r, htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
  (hqgthorleh 0 r)
→ ∃ q : hq,
  sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > q, htrue)
    (λ Hq : 0 <= q, D (q,, Hq)) 
    (hqgthorleh 0 q) ∧ r < q
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
∏ r s : hq,
r < s
→ sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > r, htrue)
    (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
    (hqgthorleh 0 r)
  ∨ ¬ sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > s, htrue)
        (λ Hq : 0 <= s, D (s,, Hq)) 
        (hqgthorleh 0 s)

  
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
∃ r : hq,
sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > r, htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
  (hqgthorleh 0 r)
 
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
∑ r : hq,
sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > r, htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
  (hqgthorleh 0 r)

    
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > - (1), htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= - (1), D (- (1),, Hq))
  (hqgthorleh 0 (- (1)))

    
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
H: 0 > - (1)
sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > - (1), htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= - (1), D (- (1),, Hq)) 
  (inl H)
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
H: 0 <= - (1)
sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > - (1), htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= - (1), D (- (1),, Hq)) 
  (inr H)

    
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
H: 0 > - (1)
sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > - (1), htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= - (1), D (- (1),, Hq)) 
  (inl H)
 exact tt.
    
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
H: 0 <= - (1)
sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > - (1), htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= - (1), D (- (1),, Hq)) 
  (inr H)

Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D

H: 0 <= - (1)
0 + 1 > - (1) + 1

Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D

        exact hq1_gt0.
  
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
∃ r : hq,
¬ sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > r, htrue)
    (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
    (hqgthorleh 0 r)
 
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
¬ D 1%NRat
∨ (∑ q : NonnegativeRationals, D q × ¬ D (q + 1)%NRat)
→ ∃ r : hq,
  ¬ sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > r, htrue)
      (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
      (hqgthorleh 0 r)

Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D

H: ¬ D 1%NRat
∑ r : hq,
¬ sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > r, htrue)
    (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
    (hqgthorleh 0 r)

Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
H: ∑ q : NonnegativeRationals, D q × ¬ D (q + 1)%NRat
∑ r : hq,
¬ sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > r, htrue)
    (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
    (hqgthorleh 0 r)

H: ¬ D 1%NRat

    (λ Hq : 0 <= 1, D (1,, Hq)) 
    (hqgthorleh 0 1)

D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D

D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
H: ¬ D 1%NRat
H0: 0 <= 1
H1: 1%NRat = 1,, H0
¬ sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > 1, htrue)
    (λ Hq : 0 <= 1, D (1,, Hq)) 
    (inr H0)

        
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
H0: 0 <= 1
H: ¬ D (1,, H0)
H1: 1%NRat = 1,, H0
¬ sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > 1, htrue)
    (λ Hq : 0 <= 1, D (1,, Hq)) 
    (inr H0)

        exact H.
    
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
H: ∑ q : NonnegativeRationals, D q × ¬ D (q + 1)%NRat
∑ r : hq,
¬ sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > r, htrue)
    (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
    (hqgthorleh 0 r)
 
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
q: ∑ q : NonnegativeRationals, D q × ¬ D (q + 1)%NRat
∑ r : hq,
¬ sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > r, htrue)
    (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
    (hqgthorleh 0 r)

      
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
q: ∑ q : NonnegativeRationals, D q × ¬ D (q + 1)%NRat
¬ sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > pr11 q + 1, htrue)
    (λ Hq : 0 <= pr11 q + 1, D (pr11 q + 1,, Hq))
    (hqgthorleh 0 (pr11 q + 1))

Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D

    (λ Hq : 0 <= pr11 q + 1, D (pr11 q + 1,, Hq))
    (inl H0)

Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D

Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
q: ∑ q : NonnegativeRationals, D q × ¬ D (q + 1)%NRat

Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
q: ∑ q : NonnegativeRationals, D q × ¬ D (q + 1)%NRat
H0: 0 <= pr11 q + 1

    (inr H0)
 
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
q: ∑ q : NonnegativeRationals, D q × ¬ D (q + 1)%NRat
H0: 0 <= pr11 q + 1
Hq1: (pr1 q + 1)%NRat = pr11 q + 1,, H0
¬ sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > pr11 q + 1, htrue)
    (λ Hq : 0 <= pr11 q + 1, D (pr11 q + 1,, Hq))
    (inr H0)

        
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
q: ∑ q : NonnegativeRationals, D q × ¬ D (q + 1)%NRat
H0: 0 <= pr11 q + 1
Hq1: (pr1 q + 1)%NRat = pr11 q + 1,, H0
Hq: ¬ D (pr1 q + 1)%NRat
¬ sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > pr11 q + 1, htrue)
    (λ Hq : 0 <= pr11 q + 1, D (pr11 q + 1,, Hq))
    (inr H0)

        
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
q: ∑ q : NonnegativeRationals, D q × ¬ D (q + 1)%NRat
H0: 0 <= pr11 q + 1
Hq1: (pr1 q + 1)%NRat = pr11 q + 1,, H0
Hq: ¬ D (pr11 q + 1,, H0)
¬ sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > pr11 q + 1, htrue)
    (λ Hq : 0 <= pr11 q + 1, D (pr11 q + 1,, Hq))
    (inr H0)

        exact Hq.
  
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
∏ r : hq,
sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > r, htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
  (hqgthorleh 0 r)
→ ∃ q : hq,
  sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > q, htrue)
    (λ Hq : 0 <= q, D (q,, Hq)) 
    (hqgthorleh 0 q) ∧ r < q
 
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
r: hq
Dr: sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > r, htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
  (hqgthorleh 0 r)
∃ q : hq,
sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > q, htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= q, D (q,, Hq)) 
  (hqgthorleh 0 q) ∧ r < q

    
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
r: hq
Hr: 0 > r
Dr: sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > r, htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
  (inl Hr)
∃ q : hq,
sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > q, htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= q, D (q,, Hq)) 
  (hqgthorleh 0 q) ∧ r < q
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
r: hq
Hr: 0 <= r
Dr: sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > r, htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
  (inr Hr)
∃ q : hq,
sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > q, htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= q, D (q,, Hq)) 
  (hqgthorleh 0 q) ∧ r < q

    
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
r: hq
Hr: 0 > r
Dr: sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > r, htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
  (inl Hr)
∃ q : hq,
sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > q, htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= q, D (q,, Hq)) 
  (hqgthorleh 0 q) ∧ r < q
 
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
r: hq
Hr: 0 > r
Dr: sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > r, htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
  (inl Hr)
q:= hqlth_between r 0 Hr: ∑ z : hq, r < z × z < 0
∃ q : hq,
sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > q, htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= q, D (q,, Hq)) 
  (hqgthorleh 0 q) ∧ r < q

Dr: sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > r, htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
  (inl Hr)
q:= hqlth_between r 0 Hr: ∑ z : hq, r < z × z < 0
∑ q : hq,
sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > q, htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= q, D (q,, Hq)) 
  (hqgthorleh 0 q) ∧ r < q

      
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
r: hq
Hr: 0 > r
Dr: sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > r, htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
  (inl Hr)
q:= hqlth_between r 0 Hr: ∑ z : hq, r < z × z < 0
sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > pr1 q, htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= pr1 q, D (pr1 q,, Hq))
  (hqgthorleh 0 (pr1 q)) ∧ 
r < pr1 q

Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D

r: hq

Dr: sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > r, htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
  (inl Hr)
q:= hqlth_between r 0 Hr: ∑ z : hq, z > r × 0 > z
Hq: 0 <= pr1 q
0 > pr1 q

               exact (pr2 (pr2 q)).

Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D

  (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
  (inl Hr)
q:= hqlth_between r 0 Hr: ∑ z : hq, r < z × z < 0
r < pr1 q
 exact (pr1 (pr2 q)).
    
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
r: hq

Dr: sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > r, htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
  (inr Hr)

D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
r: hq
Hr: 0 <= r
Dr: sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > r, htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
  (inr Hr)
(∃ y : NonnegativeRationals, D y × (r,, Hr < y)%NRat)
→ ∃ q : hq,
  sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > q, htrue)
    (λ Hq : 0 <= q, D (q,, Hq)) 
    (hqgthorleh 0 q) ∧ r < q

→ ∑ q : hq,
  sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > q, htrue)
    (λ Hq : 0 <= q, D (q,, Hq)) 
    (hqgthorleh 0 q) ∧ r < q

  (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
  (inr Hr)
q: ∑ y : NonnegativeRationals,
D y × (r,, Hr < y)%NRat
Hq: 0 > pr11 q
?Goal1 > ?Goal2
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
r: hq

  (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
  (inr Hr)
q: ∑ y : NonnegativeRationals,
D y × (r,, Hr < y)%NRat
Hq: 0 > pr11 q

r: hq

  (inr Hr)

0 <= pr11 q
 exact (pr2 (pr1 q)).

r: hq

sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > pr11 q, htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= pr11 q, D (pr11 q,, Hq)) 
  (inr Hq) ∧ r < pr11 q

D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp

Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D

  (λ Hq : 0 <= pr11 q, D (pr11 q,, Hq))

D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
r: hq
Hr: 0 <= r
Dr: sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > r, htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
  (inr Hr)
q: ∑ y : NonnegativeRationals,
D y × (r,, Hr < y)%NRat
Hq: 0 <= pr11 q
Hq1: pr1 q = pr11 q,, Hq
Hq': D (pr11 q,, Hq)
sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > pr11 q, htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= pr11 q, D (pr11 q,, Hq)) 
  (inr Hq)

           exact Hq'.

D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
r: hq

Dr: sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > r, htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
  (inr Hr)
q: ∑ y : NonnegativeRationals,
D y × (r,, Hr < y)%NRat
Hq: 0 <= pr11 q
Hq': pr1 (r,, Hr) < pr11 q
r < pr11 q

           exact Hq'.
  
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
∏ r s : hq,
r < s
→ sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > r, htrue)
    (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
    (hqgthorleh 0 r)
  ∨ ¬ sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > s, htrue)
        (λ Hq : 0 <= s, D (s,, Hq)) 
        (hqgthorleh 0 s)
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
r, q: hq
Hrq: r < q
sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > r, htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
  (hqgthorleh 0 r)
∨ ¬ sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > q, htrue)
      (λ Hq : 0 <= q, D (q,, Hq)) 
      (hqgthorleh 0 q)

    
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
r, q: hq
Hrq: r < q
Hr: 0 > r
sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > r, htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
  (inl Hr)
∨ ¬ sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > q, htrue)
      (λ Hq : 0 <= q, D (q,, Hq)) 
      (hqgthorleh 0 q)
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
r, q: hq
Hrq: r < q
Hr: 0 <= r
sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > r, htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
  (inr Hr)
∨ ¬ sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > q, htrue)
      (λ Hq : 0 <= q, D (q,, Hq)) 
      (hqgthorleh 0 q)

    
D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
r, q: hq
Hrq: r < q
Hr: 0 > r
sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > r, htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
  (inl Hr)
∨ ¬ sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > q, htrue)
      (λ Hq : 0 <= q, D (q,, Hq)) 
      (hqgthorleh 0 q)
 apply hinhpr, ii1, tt.

Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D

Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D

  (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
  (inr Hr)
∨ ¬ sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > q, htrue)
      (λ Hq : 0 <= q, D (q,, Hq)) 
      (inl Hq)

D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
r, q: hq
Hrq: r < q
Hr: 0 <= r
Hq: 0 <= q
sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > r, htrue)
  (λ Hq : 0 <= r, D (r,, Hq)) 
  (inr Hr)
∨ ¬ sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > q, htrue)
      (λ Hq : 0 <= q, D (q,, Hq))

D: NonnegativeRationals → hProp
Hbot: Dcuts_def_bot D
Hopen: Dcuts_def_open D
Hcorr: Dcuts_def_corr D
r, q: hq
Hrq: r < q
Hr: 0 <= r
Hq: 0 <= q
pr1 (r,, Hr) < pr1 (q,, Hq)

      exact Hrq.
Qed.


(∑ S : hq → hProp,
 isOneSided S × (∏ q : hq, q < 0 → S q)) ≃ Dcuts


(∑ S : hq → hProp,
 isOneSided S × (∏ q : hq, q < 0 → S q)) ≃ Dcuts

  
f:= (λ D : ∑ S : hq → hProp,
       isOneSided S × (∏ q : hq, q < 0 → S q),
 make_Dcuts
   (λ r : NonnegativeRationals, pr1 D (pr1 r))
   (isOneSided_Dcuts_bot (pr1 D) (pr12 D))
   (isOneSided_Dcuts_open (pr1 D) (pr12 D))
   (isOneSided_Dcuts_corr (pr1 D) (pr12 D)))
:
(∑ S : hq → hProp,
 isOneSided S × (∏ q : hq, q < 0 → S q)) → Dcuts: (∑ S : hq → hProp,
 isOneSided S × (∏ q : hq, q < 0 → S q)) → Dcuts

 isOneSided S × (∏ q : hq, q < 0 → S q)) ≃ Dcuts

 make_Dcuts

   (isOneSided_Dcuts_bot (pr1 D) (pr12 D))
   (isOneSided_Dcuts_open (pr1 D) (pr12 D))
   (isOneSided_Dcuts_corr (pr1 D) (pr12 D)))
:
(∑ S : hq → hProp,
 isOneSided S × (∏ q : hq, q < 0 → S q)) → Dcuts: (∑ S : hq → hProp,
 isOneSided S × (∏ q : hq, q < 0 → S q)) → Dcuts
∏ (D : Dcuts) (q : hq),
q < 0
→ sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > q, htrue)
    (λ Hq : 0 <= q, pr1 D (q,, Hq)) (hqgthorleh 0 q)

   (is_Dcuts_open D) (is_Dcuts_corr D),, Hg D)
:
Dcuts
→ ∑ S : hq → hProp,
  isOneSided S × (∏ q : hq, q < 0 → S q): Dcuts
→ ∑ S : hq → hProp,
  isOneSided S × (∏ q : hq, q < 0 → S q)

f:= (λ D : ∑ S : hq → hProp,
       isOneSided S × (∏ q : hq, q < 0 → S q),
 make_Dcuts
   (λ r : NonnegativeRationals, pr1 D (pr1 r))
   (isOneSided_Dcuts_bot (pr1 D) (pr12 D))
   (isOneSided_Dcuts_open (pr1 D) (pr12 D))
   (isOneSided_Dcuts_corr (pr1 D) (pr12 D)))

    (λ Hq : 0 <= q, pr1 D (q,, Hq))
    (hqgthorleh 0 q)

  sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > q, htrue)

   (is_Dcuts_open D) (is_Dcuts_corr D),, Hg D)

  (λ _ : ¬ (0 > q), pr1 D q) (inl Hq)

       isOneSided S × (∏ q : hq, q < 0 → S q),
 make_Dcuts
   (λ r : NonnegativeRationals, pr1 D (pr1 r))

→ sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > q, htrue)

    (hqgthorleh 0 q)

 isDcuts_OneSided (pr1 D) (is_Dcuts_bot D)
   (is_Dcuts_open D) (is_Dcuts_corr D),, Hg D)

   (λ r : NonnegativeRationals, pr1 D (pr1 r))
   (isOneSided_Dcuts_bot (pr1 D) (pr12 D))
   (isOneSided_Dcuts_open (pr1 D) (pr12 D))
   (isOneSided_Dcuts_corr (pr1 D) (pr12 D)))
:
(∑ S : hq → hProp,
 isOneSided S × (∏ q : hq, q < 0 → S q)) → Dcuts: (∑ S : hq → hProp,
 isOneSided S × (∏ q : hq, q < 0 → S q)) → Dcuts
Hg: ∏ (D : Dcuts) (q : hq),
q < 0
→ sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > q, htrue)
    (λ Hq : 0 <= q, pr1 D (q,, Hq))
    (hqgthorleh 0 q)
g:= (λ D : Dcuts,
 (λ q : hq,
  sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > q, htrue)
    (λ Hq : 0 <= q, pr1 D (q,, Hq))
    (hqgthorleh 0 q)),,
 isDcuts_OneSided (pr1 D) (is_Dcuts_bot D)
   (is_Dcuts_open D) (is_Dcuts_corr D),, Hg D)
:
Dcuts
→ ∑ S : hq → hProp,
  isOneSided S × (∏ q : hq, q < 0 → S q): Dcuts
→ ∑ S : hq → hProp,
  isOneSided S × (∏ q : hq, q < 0 → S q)
D: Dcuts
q: NonnegativeRationals
Dq: pr1 D q
Hq: 0 > pr1 q
?Goal0 <= ?Goal1
f:= (λ D : ∑ S : hq → hProp,
       isOneSided S × (∏ q : hq, q < 0 → S q),
 make_Dcuts
   (λ r : NonnegativeRationals, pr1 D (pr1 r))
   (isOneSided_Dcuts_bot (pr1 D) (pr12 D))
   (isOneSided_Dcuts_open (pr1 D) (pr12 D))
   (isOneSided_Dcuts_corr (pr1 D) (pr12 D)))

    (hqgthorleh 0 q)

 (λ q : hq,
  sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > q, htrue)
    (λ Hq : 0 <= q, pr1 D (q,, Hq))

   (is_Dcuts_open D) (is_Dcuts_corr D),, Hg D)

→ ∑ S : hq → hProp,

q: NonnegativeRationals

Hq: 0 > pr1 q
?Goal0 <= ?Goal1
 exact (pr2 q).
        
f:= (λ D : ∑ S : hq → hProp,
       isOneSided S × (∏ q : hq, q < 0 → S q),
 make_Dcuts
   (λ r : NonnegativeRationals, pr1 D (pr1 r))
   (isOneSided_Dcuts_bot (pr1 D) (pr12 D))

→ sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > q, htrue)
    (λ Hq : 0 <= q, pr1 D (q,, Hq))
    (hqgthorleh 0 q)

  sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > q, htrue)
    (λ Hq : 0 <= q, pr1 D (q,, Hq))

 isDcuts_OneSided (pr1 D) (is_Dcuts_bot D)
   (is_Dcuts_open D) (is_Dcuts_corr D),, Hg D)
:
Dcuts
→ ∑ S : hq → hProp,
  isOneSided S × (∏ q : hq, q < 0 → S q): Dcuts
→ ∑ S : hq → hProp,
  isOneSided S × (∏ q : hq, q < 0 → S q)
D: Dcuts
q: NonnegativeRationals
Dq: pr1 D q
Hq: 0 > pr1 q
0 > pr1 q
 exact Hq.
      
f:= (λ D : ∑ S : hq → hProp,
       isOneSided S × (∏ q : hq, q < 0 → S q),
 make_Dcuts
   (λ r : NonnegativeRationals, pr1 D (pr1 r))
   (isOneSided_Dcuts_bot (pr1 D) (pr12 D))
   (isOneSided_Dcuts_open (pr1 D) (pr12 D))
   (isOneSided_Dcuts_corr (pr1 D) (pr12 D)))
:
(∑ S : hq → hProp,
 isOneSided S × (∏ q : hq, q < 0 → S q)) → Dcuts: (∑ S : hq → hProp,
 isOneSided S × (∏ q : hq, q < 0 → S q)) → Dcuts
Hg: ∏ (D : Dcuts) (q : hq),
q < 0
→ sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > q, htrue)
    (λ Hq : 0 <= q, pr1 D (q,, Hq))
    (hqgthorleh 0 q)
g:= (λ D : Dcuts,
 (λ q : hq,
  sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > q, htrue)
    (λ Hq : 0 <= q, pr1 D (q,, Hq))
    (hqgthorleh 0 q)),,
 isDcuts_OneSided (pr1 D) (is_Dcuts_bot D)
   (is_Dcuts_open D) (is_Dcuts_corr D),, Hg D)
:
Dcuts
→ ∑ S : hq → hProp,
  isOneSided S × (∏ q : hq, q < 0 → S q): Dcuts
→ ∑ S : hq → hProp,
  isOneSided S × (∏ q : hq, q < 0 → S q)
D: Dcuts
q: NonnegativeRationals
Dq: pr1 D q
Hq: 0 <= pr1 q
sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > pr1 q, htrue)
  (λ Hq : ¬ (0 > pr1 q), pr1 D (pr1 q,, Hq)) (inr Hq)
 
f:= (λ D : ∑ S : hq → hProp,
       isOneSided S × (∏ q : hq, q < 0 → S q),
 make_Dcuts
   (λ r : NonnegativeRationals, pr1 D (pr1 r))
   (isOneSided_Dcuts_bot (pr1 D) (pr12 D))
   (isOneSided_Dcuts_open (pr1 D) (pr12 D))
   (isOneSided_Dcuts_corr (pr1 D) (pr12 D)))
:
(∑ S : hq → hProp,
 isOneSided S × (∏ q : hq, q < 0 → S q)) → Dcuts: (∑ S : hq → hProp,
 isOneSided S × (∏ q : hq, q < 0 → S q)) → Dcuts
Hg: ∏ (D : Dcuts) (q : hq),
q < 0
→ sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > q, htrue)
    (λ Hq : 0 <= q, pr1 D (q,, Hq))
    (hqgthorleh 0 q)
g:= (λ D : Dcuts,
 (λ q : hq,
  sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > q, htrue)
    (λ Hq : 0 <= q, pr1 D (q,, Hq))
    (hqgthorleh 0 q)),,
 isDcuts_OneSided (pr1 D) (is_Dcuts_bot D)
   (is_Dcuts_open D) (is_Dcuts_corr D),, Hg D)
:
Dcuts
→ ∑ S : hq → hProp,
  isOneSided S × (∏ q : hq, q < 0 → S q): Dcuts
→ ∑ S : hq → hProp,
  isOneSided S × (∏ q : hq, q < 0 → S q)
D: Dcuts
q: NonnegativeRationals
Dq: pr1 D q
Hq: 0 <= pr1 q
Hq1: q = pr1 q,, Hq
sumofmaps (λ _ : 0 > pr1 q, htrue)
  (λ Hq : ¬ (0 > pr1 q), pr1 D (pr1 q,, Hq)) (inr Hq)

        rewrite Hq1 in Dq ; exact Dq.
Qed.
